proofs.description: Real @mysten-incubation/memwal SDK installed and integrated. Write path uses rememberAndWait() which returns real blob_id. Requires MEMWAL_PRIVATE_KEY and MEMWAL_ACCOUNT_ID in localStorage.
Read path uses memwal.recall() for semantic retrieval. Requires credentials.
Mock storage adapter provides deterministic receipts. Content hashes verified.
proofs.note: Mock mode is for local development only. Real proof requires MemWal credentials.

note: To generate real storage proof: 1) Get credentials from https://staging.memory.walrus.xyz, 2) Enter in MemWal Config panel, 3) Run demo, 4) Verify blob_id appears in memory inspector.
